infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: AnnaDatha needs photo library access to attach images or videos to your questions.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: AnnaDatha needs camera access to capture photos and videos for your questions.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: AnnaDatha needs microphone access to record audio for your questions.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: AnnaDatha uses your location to tag questions with the correct district and block.

plugins.photosPermission: AnnaDatha needs photo library access to attach images or videos to your questions.
plugins.cameraPermission: AnnaDatha needs camera access to capture photos and videos for your questions.

plugins.photosPermission: AnnaDatha needs photo library access to save and attach images or videos.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: AnnaDatha needs permission to save captured photos and videos.
